context.strict_world_caveat: strict (gate-ON, #192) FALLBACK only. PPL-only (#124) is operative -> supply tax VANISHES (wirbel #343, supply_tax=0).

synthesis.handoff_line: the verify-attention BW floor (34.9% BW, AI 7.88 << ridge 208, 96 CTAs > 80 SMs) is FORWARD-INTRINSIC, not a TRITON reduction-ordering artifact: AI is RECONSTRUCTED here from FLOPs(4*M*num_q_heads*ctx*head_dim*num_layers == M*kv_bytes_denken) / bytes-moved(KV reads + activations), and BOTH are set by the M=8 GQA verify FORWARD -- the 'KV reads x M candidates' memory-traffic pattern -- invariant to the KV-split count and online-softmax combine order (which set numerical determinism, not FLOPs/bytes). So the roofline x-position (AI 7.88, BW-bound) is KERNEL-INVARIANT. A FlashInfer-BI kernel -- REAL on sm_86 (vLLM routes VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT through the FlashInfer backend, decode_fixed_split_size=2048 + disable_split_kv=True; supports_compute_capability [7.5,12.1] includes 8.6, no Hopper gate) -- restores identity via disable_split_kv (a SINGLE serial KV reduction), which FORGOES the split-KV parallelism BY CONSTRUCTION == EXACTLY denken #332's determinism tax. FlashInfer-BI is thus a concrete instance of the deterministic-schedule family #332 bounded (phi_realizable>=1, a supremum over ALL such schedules), so recovery phi stays 7.5% << the 25.5% break-even -> flashinfer_bi_moves_phi_above_breakeven = False; flashinfer_bi_restoration_ceiling = 473.5 TPS (realizable 469.7; band 469.7-473.5), BELOW the 481.53 frontier and the 500 target. FlashInfer beats off-the-shelf BI's 357.32 by SCOPING to the attention locus (avoiding the broad determinism tax on lm_head/norms/linears), NOT by escaping the floor -- better restoration cost, SAME supply cap. Integration risk is one-directional (CUDA-graph determinism not guaranteed -> may lose ONEGRAPH host-overhead elimination -> real ceiling drops BELOW 473.5). This CLOSES the strict-fallback supply axis: NO BI kernel re-opens the strict lane. It matters ONLY in the strict (gate-ON, #192) world; the human's #124 call makes PPL-only operative (wirbel #343 kklof4wr) -> supply tax VANISHES, the >500 path is a coverage retrain, not a kernel. 0 TPS; analytic over banked numbers; BASELINE 481.53 unchanged; FlashInfer-BI kernel UNBUILT + human-approval-gated. NOT a launch. NOT a build. NOT a served-file change.

step1_arithmetic_intensity.source: RECONSTRUCTED from deployed M=8 verify geometry (PR #279 / #39) -- AI and BW reproduce denken #332's MEASURED anchors from FLOPs/bytes, proving they are forward-set, not reduction-order artifacts.

step2_floor_locus.hypothesis_A_forward_intrinsic: floor set by bytes-moved (KV reads x M) -> roofline x-position AI 7.88 << ridge 208 -> BW-bound -> KERNEL-INDEPENDENT -> any BI kernel (TRITON, FlashInfer) inherits it -> strict CLOSED.
step2_floor_locus.hypothesis_B_reduction_ordering: floor set by TRITON_ATTN's specific reduction tree -> a different tree (FlashInfer) could re-tile to a better roofline point -> phi moves -> strict RE-OPENS.

integration_risk: VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT is beta; Gemma not in vLLM's tested-model list.

FlashInfer warns CUDA-graph determinism is NOT guaranteed -> if the BI kernel cannot capture into the deployed ONEGRAPH, it ALSO loses host-overhead elimination -> real ceiling drops BELOW 473.5 (risk is one-directional).
VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT disables some opts (e.g. custom all-reduce in TP).
step3_flashinfer_status.vllm_wiring: vllm/v1/attention/backends/flashinfer.py L315-322: VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT -> decode_fixed_split_size=2048, prefill_fixed_split_size=4096, disable_split_kv=True

synthesis.verdict: STRICT-LANE-STAYS-CLOSED-FLASHINFER-INHERITS-THE-FLOOR: the verify-attention BW floor is FORWARD-INTRINSIC (bytes-moved: KV reads x M=8 candidates -> AI 7.88 << ridge 208 -> BW-bound at 34.9%, kernel-INDEPENDENT). AI = 7.88 is RECONSTRUCTED from FLOPs(4*M*Hq*ctx*hd*L = M*kv_bytes) / bytes-moved -- both forward-set, reduction-order-INVARIANT == kernel-INVARIANT. FlashInfer-BI is REAL on sm_86 (vLLM wires VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT -> FlashInfer, supports_compute_capability [7.5,12.1] includes 8.6), and its determinism mechanism (disable_split_kv + fixed_split_size>ctx -> single serial KV reduction) IS the forgo-split-KV tax denken #332 priced -- a concrete instance of the deterministic-schedule family #332 bounded (phi_realizable>=1). So recovery phi stays 7.5% << the 25.5% break-even -> flashinfer_bi_moves_phi_above_breakeven = False. Inherited strict ceiling 473.5 TPS (band 469.7-473.5), BELOW the 481.53 frontier AND the 500 target. FlashInfer BEATS off-the-shelf BI's 357.32 (by scoping to the attention locus, NOT by escaping the floor). This is the supply-side CLOSURE of the STRICT fallback ONLY; PPL-only (#124, wirbel #343) is operative -> supply tax VANISHES. 0 TPS; analytic; UNBUILT + human-gated; NOT a launch.
